meta.title: EmAI – Physical AI Consulting for Business
meta.description: EmAI Robotics helps businesses successfully adopt Physical AI -- through strategic consulting, real-world testing, workshops, and neutral assessment. Independent, European, practice-oriented.

hero.title: EmAI
hero.subtitle: We help businesses successfully adopt Physical AI. Strategic consulting, hands-on expertise, and neutral assessment.

problem.title: Why You Need a Partner
problem.description: Physical AI is evolving fast. But who decides today on the right entry point without hands-on experience? That's exactly the gap we fill.

evaluation.title: No Evaluation Framework
evaluation.description: Which robot can do what? Without real-world experience, decisions are a shot in the dark.

access.title: Technology Feels Out of Reach
access.description: AI and robotics seem like topics only for large corporations -- not for mid-sized companies.

trust.title: No Independent Knowledge
trust.description: Manufacturers sell their own solutions. Independent, hands-on data and neutral advice are missing.

loop.caption: Learning loop: every deployment becomes shared knowledge.
loop.aria: Animated learning loop: deployment produces data, data becomes knowledge that improves the next deployment.

openSource.title: Open-Source AI
openSource.description: No vendor lock-in. We rely on open models and share our knowledge. Transparency over dependency.

sovereignty.title: European Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: Data stays in Europe. GDPR-compliant. European values that we share and live by.

learning.title: Field-Tested
learning.description: Every deployment deepens our expertise and sharpens the next one. Experience from real-world projects -- directly into your roadmap.

humanFirst.title: People First
humanFirst.description: Robots fill gaps left by labor shortages. They assist people -- they don't replace them.

embodiedAi.a: Embodied AI (EmAI) means: artificial intelligence that operates in a physical body -- cognitive robots. Unlike pure software AI, these systems interact directly with the physical world. We help companies understand this technology and use it meaningfully.

cognitiveRobots.a: Cognitive robots are robots that can learn through AI models, adapt, and work in unstructured environments. They can grasp, carry, assemble, and collaborate with humans -- and are becoming more capable through open AI models.

workshops.a: Our workshops are hands-on: participants experience cognitive robots in action, understand how AI models are trained, and assess whether automation makes sense for their company. We offer on-site and virtual formats.

dataCollection.a: We collect performance data from real deployments: success rates, error types, energy consumption, cycle times, and practical limits. This data is vendor-independent and helps companies make informed decisions.

openSource.a: Open AI models provide transparency, independence, and community-driven innovation. No vendor lock-in, no proprietary black boxes. Companies keep control over their technology decisions.

humanAssist.a: No -- cognitive robots fill gaps created by labor shortages. They take over repetitive, physically demanding, or dangerous tasks and enable employees to focus on more qualified, value-adding work. People remain at the center.

consulting.a: We analyze your processes, evaluate automation needs, and create a realistic roadmap. What's possible today? What's coming in 1-2 years? How do you prepare your company? Independent and vendor-neutral.

getStarted.q: How do I get started with EmAI?
getStarted.a: Contact us for a no-obligation conversation. We'll clarify your situation, identify potential, and recommend next steps -- whether that's a workshop, real-world test, or strategic consulting.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about cognitive robotics in your organization. Workshop, consulting, or real-world test -- we'll find the right starting point.
contact.lead: Write to us directly -- we answer personally.
